description_long: This rugged all-terrain vehicle features a robust olive-green exterior with a reinforced frame and large, deeply treaded tires designed for off-road performance. The open cabin is equipped with two bucket seats, a visible steering wheel, and a roll cage for occupant safety. Mounted lights are positioned on the front bumper and above the windshield, enhancing visibility in low-light conditions. The rear of the vehicle carries a spare tire secured with red straps and additional gear, such as a rolled-up tarp or bag, attached to the side. The vehicle's suspension is visibly elevated, providing significant ground clearance for navigating rough urban or natural environments. Military-style markings and utilitarian accessories suggest it is built for durability and versatility in challenging scenarios.
description: A rugged olive-green all-terrain vehicle with large knobby tires, open cabin, roll cage, and mounted lights, designed for off-road and urban utility.
description_view_0: Front view shows the aggressive stance, four large tires, front bumper with multiple lights, and the sloped hood.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the open cabin, bucket seats, side step, gear storage, and military-style markings.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the spare tire mounted on the back, red securing straps, and rear lights.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the open cabin, side step, and additional gear storage.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a knobby, blocky all-terrain tread pattern, providing excellent grip and traction on rough, uneven surfaces.
